servinfo.title: Front Drive Shaft Disassembly and Reassembly

ptxt.intxrefpoff: Front Drive Shaft Assembly Removal and Installation:Front

attention4.ptxt: Disassembly of the wheel-side joint or the tripod joint can cause performance problems.
If anything abnormal (damage, noise, etc.) is found with either of these joints, replace the joint as an assembly.

s1.ptxt: Remove boot big band (1) of differential side (or intermediate shaft side) as follow.

attention4.ptxt: Use nippers to cut boot band if it is a welded type.
Take care not to damage boot while cutting band.

s1.ptxt: Draw hooks of boot big band together and remove band.
Remove differential side (or intermediate shaft side) joint housing from tripod joint.
Remove boot insert (1) from differential side (or intermediate shaft side) joint housing.
Wipe off grease from shaft and take off snap ring (1) using snap ring pliers (2).
Remove tripod joint (1) using 3-arm puller (2).

attention4.ptxt: Except for the housing, washing the tripod joint parts with a washing solution may cause problems with the joint.
Do not use a washing solution to clean any tripod joint parts other than the housing. Use a cloth to remove grease from tripod joints.

s1.ptxt: Use flat-bladed screwdriver (1) or the like to release caulking (2) of boot small band (3).
Pull out differential side boot (or intermediate shaft side boot) from shaft.
For M/T model, use flat-bladed screwdriver (2) or the like to release caulking of damper band (1) and remove damper from shaft.
Use flat-bladed screwdriver (1) or the like to loosen wheel side small band (2) and big band, and then pull out wheel side boot from shaft.

attention4.ptxt: Use nippers to cut boot band if it is a welded type.
Take care not to damage boot while cutting band.

servinfosub.title: Reassembly
servinfosub.ptxt: Judging from abnormality noted before disassembly and what is found through visual check of component parts after disassembly, prepare replacing parts and proceed to reassembly.
Make sure that wheel side joint assembly (1) and housing of tripod joint (2) are washed thoroughly and air dried.

attention4.ptxt: Joints may not perform as designed if proper cleaning and lubrication precautions are not taken.

item.ptxt: Do not wash boots with solvents such as gasoline or kerosene. Washing boots with these solvents causes deterioration of the boots.
Be sure to lubricate joints with the specified grease in the specified amount. Follow the instructions below to identify the specified grease and specified amount for each joint.

s1.ptxt: Wash disassembled parts (except boots). After washing parts, air dry them completely.
Clean boots with shop cloth.
Apply grease from the service kit to wheel side joint.

spec.title: Grease specification for front drive shaft wheel side joint

s1.ptxt: Install wheel side boot on shaft.
Fill boot inside with specified grease.
Insert flat-bladed screwdriver into boot (1) and allow air to enter boot so that air pressure in boot becomes the same as the atmospheric pressure.
Place new boot big band (3) and small band (4) onto wheel side boot so that outer end (1) of each band faces in the direction opposite to the forward rotating direction (2) as shown in figure.
Fasten boot band (1) using special tool as shown in figure.

attention4.ptxt: Squeezing or otherwise distorting the boot will reduce its durability.
Do not try to force air out of the boot by squeezing or otherwise distorting it when fastening it with bands.

s1.ptxt: For M/T model, install damper to specified position on right side drive shaft as shown in figure.
For M/T model, fasten new damper band (1) as shown in figure.

topic.title: Differential side (or intermediate shaft side) joint

s1.ptxt: Wash disassembled parts (except boots). After washing parts, air dry them completely.
Clean boots with shop cloth.
Install boot insert on differential side (or intermediate shaft side) joint housing.
Install differential side (or intermediate shaft side) boot on shaft.
Install tripod joint (1) on shaft using special tool with hammer, directing its chamfered spline (3) toward wheel side, and then fasten tripod joint with new snap ring (2) using snap ring pliers (4).
Using specified grease included in spare parts, apply grease “A” to tripod joint, differential side (or intermediate shaft side) joint housing (1) and boot.

spec.title: Grease specification for front drive shaft differential side (or intermediate shaft side) joint

s1.ptxt: Fit boot (1) to grooves of shaft and differential side (or intermediate shaft side) joint housing (2) at the specified position below.
Insert flat-bladed screwdriver or the like into boot (1) and allow air to enter boot so that air pressure in boot becomes the same as atmospheric pressure.
Place new boot big band (3) and small band (4) onto differential side (or intermediate shaft side) boot directing outer end (1) of each band against forward rotation (2).
Fasten boot big band and boot small band noting the following points.

attention4.ptxt: Squeezing or otherwise distorting the boot will reduce its durability.
Do not try to force air out of the boot by squeezing or otherwise distorting it when fastening it with bands.

s2.ptxt: Fasten boot big band (1) by drawing hooks (2) using special tool and engage hooks (3) as shown in figure.
Fasten boot small band (1) using special tool as shown in figure.
